name: legalcode
description: Jurisdiction-aware legal research via the Legalcode MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Search statutes, case law, regulatory guidance, agreements, and patents.
interface.longDescription: Legalcode provides jurisdiction-aware legal research over primary sources: statutes, case law, regulatory guidance, international agreements, and global patent documents. The plugin bundles a SKILL with the iterative search workflow plus the remote Legalcode MCP server so Codex can discover facets, run targeted queries, and verify sources without leaving the terminal.
defaultPrompt: Find the GDPR article on data subject access requests
Search Icelandic case law on data protection
Pull recent EU regulatory guidance on AI
